---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a product improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What player problem does this solve?

## Proposal

Describe the feature.

## MVP fit

Why should this be part of the current MVP?

## Privacy and safety impact

Does this affect location, player identity, invite links, screenshots or social sharing?

## Alternatives

What simpler option could solve the same problem?
